headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://*.stellar.org https://*.google.com https://*.firebase.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: https://*.stellar.org https://*.googleusercontent.com https://firebasestorage.googleapis.com; connect-src 'self' https://*.stellar.org https://*.firebaseio.com https://*.googleapis.com;
